---
title: "Project Overview"
---

## Background

Describe the problem context and why this project is important. What gap does it address?

## Objectives

- Objective 1
- Objective 2
- Objective 3

## Dataset

Describe the dataset(s) used — source, size, time period, key variables.

| Dataset | Source | Records | Period |
|---------|--------|---------|--------|
| Dataset 1 | Source A | ~10,000 | 2020–2024 |

## Project Scope

What is in scope and out of scope for this project?

## Timeline

| Milestone | Date |
|-----------|------|
| Project Kickoff | Week 1 |
| Data Preparation | Week 3 |
| Prototype v1 | Week 6 |
| Final Submission | Week 13 |
